# Test Site

> A test site for jekyll-ai-visible-content

## About

Eugene Leontev is Backend engineer specializing in Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, and AWS.

- Role: Senior Backend Engineer / Fractional CTO
- Location: Tbilisi, GE

## Key Topics

- Ruby on Rails
- PostgreSQL
- AWS

## Posts

URL: https://example.com/engineering/2025/01/20/rails-n-plus-one-solutions.html
Date: 2025-01-20

This post covers N+1 query solutions in Ruby on Rails.
PostgreSQL is the database we use.
